_description: Fixture-only proof data for minimal-infra-repo. State C (minimally populated). Not real infrastructure content — for bootstrap self-test validation only.

placeholder_values.REPO_MISSION_STATEMENT: A minimal Terraform infrastructure fixture for agent-bootstrap self-test proof. Not production infrastructure.
placeholder_values.REPO_OVERVIEW: Single-environment (dev) Terraform infrastructure fixture. Used to prove the bootstrap apply and validate workflow on a documentation/infrastructure-oriented target repository.
placeholder_values.REPO_OBJECTIVE: Provide a minimal, believable infrastructure fixture for bootstrap self-tests.
placeholder_values.IN_SCOPE_ITEMS:
- Dev environment Terraform configuration (environments/dev/)
- Architecture documentation (docs/architecture.md)
placeholder_values.OUT_OF_SCOPE_ITEMS:
- Application runtime code
- CI/CD pipeline configuration
- Other environments (staging, prod) — fixture only has dev
placeholder_values.PRIMARY_CONFIG_FILE_DESCRIPTION: Example Terraform variable definitions for the dev environment
placeholder_values.REPO_SPECIFIC_FORBIDDEN_ACTION_1: Do not run terraform apply without explicit authorization — this fixture is for structure proof only.
placeholder_values.REPO_SPECIFIC_FORBIDDEN_ACTION_2: Do not add real credentials or secrets to any tracked file.
placeholder_values.KEY_FILE_1_PURPOSE: High-level architecture overview for the infrastructure
placeholder_values.KEY_FILE_2_PURPOSE: Example Terraform variable file for the dev environment
placeholder_values.ENTRY_POINT_NOTES: Run terraform commands from the environments/dev/ directory
placeholder_values.TEST_RUNNER_NOTES: terraform validate checks configuration syntax; no application unit tests
placeholder_values.BUILD_SCRIPT_NOTES: terraform plan produces an execution plan; no compiled artifact
placeholder_values.CONFIG_FILE_1_PURPOSE: Example variable definitions for dev environment
placeholder_values.KNOWN_COMPLEXITY: Minimal by design — this is a fixture repo with no real Terraform resources
placeholder_values.DEP_2_ROLE: No additional dependencies in this fixture
placeholder_values.BUILD_CONFIG_FILE: environments/dev/ (no explicit build config file in this fixture)
placeholder_values.BUILD_EXPECTED_OUTPUT: Terraform plan output (no changes expected for empty fixture)
placeholder_values.TEST_CONFIG_FILE: none (terraform validate uses the .tf files directly)
placeholder_values.RUN_EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: terraform plan shows no resources to create (fixture has no .tf resource files)
placeholder_values.ENV_SETUP_NOTES: Copy placeholder.tfvars.example to terraform.tfvars and fill in real values before applying. Do not commit terraform.tfvars.
placeholder_values.AI_API_1_USAGE: No AI APIs used in this fixture
placeholder_values.AI_FRAMEWORK_1_PURPOSE: No AI frameworks used in this fixture
placeholder_values.CLOUD_PROVIDER: none (fixture only — no real cloud resources)
placeholder_values.VENDOR_SDK_NOTES: No vendor SDKs used in this fixture.
placeholder_values.PLATFORM_CONSTRAINTS: Terraform 1.x required for validate and plan commands.
placeholder_values.MODEL_VERSION_NOTES: No AI models used in this fixture.
placeholder_values.MILESTONE_1_NOTES: Bootstrap scaffold applied via apply_bootstrap.py; fixture-only State C proof run
placeholder_values.MILESTONE_2_NOTES: Fixture does not have further planned milestones
placeholder_values.DECISION_1: Use HCL/Terraform as the infrastructure-as-code tool
placeholder_values.DECISION_1_REASON: Common infra-repo shape; distinct from Python service fixture to prove different discovery path
placeholder_values.DECISION_1_ALTERNATIVE: Pulumi or CloudFormation (deferred: not needed for this fixture's proof purpose)
placeholder_values.DECISION_2: No real Terraform resource files in fixture
placeholder_values.DECISION_2_REASON: Fixture is for bootstrap proof only; adding real resources would add unnecessary complexity
placeholder_values.DECISION_2_ALTERNATIVE: Include a minimal null_resource (rejected: adds provider dependency)
placeholder_values.OPEN_ITEM_1: No open items — fixture is complete for self-test purposes
placeholder_values.SESSION_SUMMARY: Bootstrap scaffold applied and State C population proof data applied. Fixture validates clean.
placeholder_values.CLOSEOUT_STATE: Complete — fixture ready for bootstrap self-test harness
placeholder_values.BOOTSTRAP_NOTES: Applied via run_fixture_selftest.py for Milestone 9 State C proof. Fixture-only data.
